items.example: She works in the fashion industry as a designer.
The entertainment industry includes film, TV and music.
He works in retail, managing a clothing store.
Many people work in construction, building new houses and offices.
My sister works in healthcare as a nurse.
Hotels and restaurants are part of the hospitality industry.
She chose a career in education and became a teacher.
The manufacturing sector produces cars, electronics and clothes.
I work freelance from home as a graphic designer.
Nurses often work long shifts, including night shifts.
